product_overview: Thread and Crochet is a premium boutique storefront for handcrafted amigurumi plushies, cozy wearables, and custom crochet home decor. It presents products through a polished shopping experience with browsing, cart, checkout, and support contact options.
core_goals: Browse the boutique storefront and discover featured products and collections
Navigate between public pages with a polished page transition experience
Use the shopping cart and checkout flow to purchase items
Submit a customer inquiry through the contact form
Read boutique blog content and learn more about the brand

features.name: Premium Storefront Landing Page
features.description: A polished homepage that showcases product promos, featured collections, best sellers, blog highlights, and customer reviews.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse featured promos and collections -> Review best sellers and customer reviews -> Open a product or informational page

features.name: Page Transitions & Loading Screen
features.description: A custom loading overlay appears during client-side navigation and shows boutique-themed progress animation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open an internal page -> See the custom loading overlay appear during the transition -> See the progress indicator complete -> Arrive on the destination page

features.name: Scroll to Top Navigation
features.description: A floating control helps users return to the top of long pages while showing scroll progress.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> See the scroll progress control appear -> Click the control -> Return smoothly to the top of the page

features.name: Product Browsing & Details
features.description: The storefront supports viewing product-related pages, managing items in the cart, completing checkout forms, and contacting support.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse the storefront content -> Open /cart to review selected items -> Open /checkout to enter checkout information -> Submit the checkout form to continue the purchase
Navigate to / -> Open /contact -> Fill in the inquiry form -> Submit the form -> See confirmation that the message was sent
Navigate to / -> Open /blog -> Browse article listings -> Open an article to read more

features.name: About Brand Information
features.description: An informational page explains the boutique brand and its craft-focused identity.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read the brand story and boutique details

routes.description: Homepage featuring product promos, collections, and reviews
About Us page describing the boutique brand

features.name: PageLoader Route Transitions
features.description: Custom boutique page loading overlay displaying a yarn ball and hook progress indicator on routing changes
user_interactions: Click on any client-side link (e.g. About Us or Contact)
Verify the custom PageLoader appears and fills up the circular progress ring
Verify the overlay completes to 100% and scales/fades out smoothly on route load completion

features.name: Scroll to Top Navigation
features.description: Scroll to top progress button that appears when scrolling down
user_interactions: Scroll down on the homepage past 300px
See the Scroll to Top button fade and slide up in the bottom-right corner
Scroll further down and verify the circular outer ring fills based on scroll position
Hover over the button to check for scale, glow backplate aura, and double-arrow slide-up animation
Click the button to trigger smooth scroll back to the top of the page
